content.full_text:
Sally Anne (Miller) Sheridan
Irvine Mayor 1990

January 26, 1990

F.P.P.C.
Legal Division
428 "J" Street, #800
Sacramento, CA 95814

RE: TRANSFER OF ASSETS BETWEEN CONTROLLED COMMITTEES

My old campaign committee for the Irvine City Council purchased a typewriter, and later a computer, monitor and two printers to facilitate the campaign and support my council activities. As directed, I have formed a new campaign committee to seek the position of Mayor in this June's election.

I now wish to close out the old committee and, therefore, transfer those office machines to my new committee. As I understand the direction of your legal department, there is no problem with doing so and no forms, etc., need to be filed. Relative to my phone conversation of last week with Mary Ann, I would appreciate a written statement to that effect.

Thank you for your assistance.

Sincerely,

Kay McNally for
SALLY ANNE SHERIDAN
Sally Anne Sheridan for Mayor 1990
ID #891108

c: Michael Flynn, Treasurer
